title: Ubiquiti UA-G2 - UniFi Access Reader G2, black
category: Ubiquiti UA-G2 - UniFi Access Reader G2, black
description: UniFi Access Reader G2 is an NFC reader that is part of the UniFi Access solution. The reader for communicating with other elements uses a LAN port with 802.3af PoE support, it is easy to install under the plaster, it has an IP55 degree of protection and supports the latest NFC security standards (13.56 MHz) including MIFARE DESFire encryption encrypted with AES-128. Unlocking the door is quick and secure using an NFC card or a mobile app NFC Tag 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 MIFARE Classic MIFARE Plus MIFARE Ultralight MIFARE DESFire Elegant NFC and Bluetooth access reader Power supply via 802.3af PoE using UniFi Access Hub Advanced NFC security (MIFARE DESFire) Mobile access with app (1.5.9+) Device (UA-G2) Wall mounting box Screws
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Reader technology Mifare (13.56 MHz) LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af Power type PoE Max. power consumption [W] 5
